title: Willoughbya burchellii
taxonomy: Willoughbya burchellii is a genus of flowering plants in the family Strelitziaceae. The genus is endemic to South Africa. It is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species, W. burchellii. The classification of the plant places it within the order Zingiberales. The family Strelitziaceae is a group of flowering plants that are closely related to the banana family, Musaceae.
